seoTitle: Ramco vs Ramco Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ramco and Ramco Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ramco vs Ramco Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ramco and Ramco Heights.
heading: Ramco vs Ramco Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ramco, South Australia and Ramco Heights, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ramco has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ramco Heights (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ramco or Ramco Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ramco has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Ramco Heights scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ramco scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Ramco Heights scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ramco or Ramco Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ramco has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
